title: Souvik Sarkar
text:
Professionally, I am a technical writer with experience in docs-as-code workflows and open source environments. I write technical content for software engineers, dev-ops engineers, and system administrators. Currently I work at SUSE, and before that at Red Hat, Fusioncharts (data visualization), and Ribbon Communications (telecom). In my early career, I worked as a web developer and software engineer for a few years.
As a hobby, I like learning Mathematics and Statistics. This is what keeps my brain alive and going - the difficult puzzles and the satisfaction of solving them. Most of the posts in this blog are notes from my academic misadventures. Occassionaly, you might also find a few posts about side projects that I did, or my unqualified opinions about something that I found interesting.
In my free time I play with my son and watch stand-up comedy videos on YouTube. Oh, and did I say that I often zone out, day dream, procrastinate, and overthink?
If you wish to contact me, drop me an email at sounix000@gmail.com.
